scripts.package:mac: npm run build:helper && npm run build:mac-input && electron-packager apps/desktop "Remote Control MVP" --platform=darwin --arch=x64 --out=dist --overwrite --asar --prune=false --extra-resource=native-input-helper/target/release/native-input-helper --extra-resource=native-mac-input-addon/build/Release/mac-input.node && codesign --force --sign "${CODESIGN_IDENTITY:-Remote Control MVP Local Code Signing}" --identifier com.electron.remote-control-mvp.native-input-helper "dist/Remote Control MVP-darwin-x64/Remote Control MVP.app/Contents/Resources/native-input-helper" && codesign --force --sign "${CODESIGN_IDENTITY:-Remote Control MVP Local Code Signing}" "dist/Remote Control MVP-darwin-x64/Remote Control MVP.app/Contents/Resources/mac-input.node" && codesign --force --deep --sign "${CODESIGN_IDENTITY:-Remote Control MVP Local Code Signing}" "dist/Remote Control MVP-darwin-x64/Remote Control MVP.app"
